title: Car Track 5m Includes 4 Cars: KETIEE Flexible Race Track Car Ramp Track Toy Car Race Track Rolls Up Portable Dual Racetrack for Jumps Loops Ramps for 1/64th Cars for Ages 3+, Blue
features: 【5M Race Car Track Set】KETIEE car track set includes 5 metres of flexible racing track (double track), 4 racing cars, 8 suction cups and a starting point to take with you! The track set is designed for both indoor and outdoor use.

【Durable Flexible Race Track】The race car track set is made of high quality PVC material that is durable and flexible. The double track can be easily rolled up and stored when not in use. It does not crease or tear easily and can withstand the wear and tear of kids' play.

【Cultivating Creativity and Imagination】A 5m bendable car track that lets the laws of physics take its course! This is no ordinary car track; it's a portal to infinite creativity, allowing your race car to twist, turn, swerve and dive at any time and become legendary.

【Portable Car Racing Track Set】No assembly required, easily mounts to any smooth surface, rolls up for easy storage and portability, can be used indoors and outdoors, beaches, parks, staircases, and living rooms to create enjoyable playtime. Attaches to any smooth surface you want, windows, mirrors, marble table tops, refrigerators, can't attach to non-smooth surfaces.

【Best Gifts for Kids】Car tracks can also be turned into car waterslides. Versatile enough to make a loop slide or a ramp. It's ideal for die-cast cars and monster trucks, and makes a great birthday gift for children ages 3 and up.
